description_long: This sculpture features a large, roughly square marble block set upright on a broad, textured stone base. Atop the block sits a smooth, abstract circular form with a hollowed center, resembling a partially open ring or disc. The marble surfaces display natural veining and weathering, with some discoloration and patina, suggesting exposure to the elements. The base is expansive and slightly uneven, with a stone-like texture and visible seams or cracks. The overall composition is minimalist and geometric, emphasizing the contrast between the angular block and the curved upper form. The sculpture exudes a sense of balance and modern abstraction, likely intended as a public art installation.
description: A minimalist marble sculpture with a square block base and an abstract circular form on top, set on a large textured stone platform. The piece features geometric contrasts and weathered surfaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square marble block with the circular form perched on top, highlighting the weathered veining and the broad stone base.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thickness of the marble block and the depth of the circular form, with the base extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the block and the circular form, with more visible surface discoloration and the expansive stone base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the profile of the block and the circular form, emphasizing the geometric interplay and the textured platform.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed on a large stone platform, suggesting an outdoor urban or park setting.
